text.title: Meta Ads Campaign Setup Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is pixel firing AND ≥10 conv events/day visible AND budget ≥ $20/day per ad set?

conclusion.verdict: use ABO with manual per-ad-set budgets

text.example: pixel_ok=true, conv_per_day=18, budget=$200/day for 3 ad sets → 80 conv/wk → CBO.
